evals.description: Triggers on digital PR outreach request
evals.prompt: I want to earn editorial backlinks through digital PR. How do I start?
How do I pitch HARO or Connectively queries to earn backlinks?

evals.description: Can explain broken link building process end-to-end
evals.prompt: Walk me through the broken link building process step by step

evals.description: Can write a broken link outreach email
evals.prompt: Write an outreach email for broken link building to a resource page owner

evals.description: Can explain anchor text distribution best practices
evals.prompt: What should a healthy anchor text profile look like for a site with 500 backlinks?

evals.description: Can explain how to audit a backlink profile for toxic links
evals.prompt: How do I identify toxic links in my backlink profile?

evals.description: Can produce a valid disavow file format
evals.prompt: Show me how to create a Google disavow file for a list of toxic domains

evals.description: Gotcha - warns against over-disavowing legitimate links
evals.prompt: Should I disavow all low domain authority links pointing to my site?

evals.description: Gotcha - warns against paid links without nofollow
evals.prompt: I can pay a site $200 to get a dofollow link on their homepage. Is this a good strategy?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination - does not invent link building metrics or tools
evals.prompt: What is the Google Link Score metric and how does it affect my site's PageRank?

evals.description: References link-audit.md for full audit process
evals.prompt: Give me a comprehensive guide to auditing my backlink profile for a recovery from a possible Google penalty
